summary: Completed testing of new features: 1) Document validation page (/validar) - UI loads correctly, API endpoints working 2) DOEM PDF generation - working correctly 3) User signature_data fields - all 5 fields present with proper masks 4) Pagination in Gestão Processual - working with localStorage persistence. CRITICAL BUG FOUND: Document validation system is broken - validation codes are not being saved to database.

critical.issue: Document validation system is broken - validation codes generated in PDF are never saved to document_signatures collection. The assinatura_digital field in DOEM editions doesn't include validation_code. QR codes on PDFs will never validate.
critical.root_cause: In publicar_edicao() function (line 4401), gerar_assinatura_simulada() doesn't generate validation_code. In gerar_pdf_doem() (line 4605), validation_code is generated on-the-fly but never persisted to database.
critical.fix_suggestion: 1) Modify gerar_assinatura_simulada() to include validation_code 2) Call save_document_signature() when publishing DOEM edition 3) Store validation_code in assinatura_digital field

minor.issue: No server-side pagination support - all 74 items returned regardless of limit parameter
minor.note: This is by design - pagination is handled on frontend

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix document validation system - validation codes must be saved to document_signatures collection when publishing DOEM editions
Modify gerar_assinatura_simulada() to generate and return validation_code
Store validation_code in assinatura_digital field of DOEM editions
critical_code_review_comments: Line 4011-4020 (gerar_assinatura_simulada): Function doesn't generate validation_code - needs to be added
Line 4401-4447 (publicar_edicao): Missing call to save_document_signature() - validation records never created
Line 4605 (gerar_pdf_doem): validation_code generated on-the-fly with generate_validation_code() but never persisted
document_signatures collection is empty - no validation records exist in database

api_endpoints.POST /api/validar/verificar: WORKING - but always returns invalid (no records in DB)
api_endpoints.GET /api/validar/{code}: WORKING - but always returns invalid (no records in DB)

validation_page.status: UI WORKING, VALIDATION BROKEN (no records saved)

doem_pdf.status: WORKING - PDF generated with signature seal and QR code
doem_pdf.issue: QR code validation will fail because validation_code not saved to DB

seed_data_creation: None - used existing DOEM edition doem_57dc5741c733
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRITICAL BUG: Document validation system is broken. The validation page UI works, API endpoints work, but validation always fails because no validation codes are saved to document_signatures collection. When DOEM is published, gerar_assinatura_simulada() doesn't create validation_code, and save_document_signature() is never called. The QR codes on PDFs point to validation URLs that will never work. Main agent needs to: 1) Add validation_code to DOEMAssinatura model 2) Call save_document_signature() when publishing 3) Store validation_code in assinatura_digital field. All other features (pagination, user signature_data fields, PDF generation) are working correctly.
